apps/web.rationale: The workspace currently contains only minimal React bootstrap behavior and static heading rendering, so dedicated behavioral tests would be artificial at this stage.

apps/workos-cli.rationale: The workspace is currently a pre-implementation placeholder with no meaningful application behavior to protect through dedicated tests.

packages/application.rationale: The workspace currently contains interfaces only and has no concrete runtime behavior requiring behavioral tests.

packages/contracts.rationale: The workspace currently provides compile-time contracts and interfaces without concrete runtime behavior.

packages/sdk.rationale: The workspace currently contains interfaces and type-only imports without concrete runtime behavior.

packages/testing.rationale: The workspace is currently an intentionally empty placeholder and therefore has no behavior to protect with tests.
